for_firing.interpretation: FoR fires very early (within 2 bars), indicating scouts are short-term and this is correct behavior

scout_profitability_by_bar.key_insight: CLIFF DROP at bar 5: Only 2% profitable vs 100% in bars 1-4

scout_milestones.interpretation: When scouts are profitable, they exit very quickly (avg 3.24 bars)

timeout_analytics.key_insight: ALL timeouts are unprofitable, losing 1.175% avg each

root_cause.problem: Scout entry timing is poor - entering at exhaustion/end of momentum
evidence: 42 scouts hit TARGET (9.7%) - these are quick profits
219 scouts timeout (51%) - these are slow losses
root_cause.hypothesis: VFMD signals are triggering LATE in momentum move, not at start

solutions_ranked.solution: Reduce timeout from bar 5 to bar 4 (or 3)
solutions_ranked.impact: Capture more profits before mean reversion kicks in

solutions_ranked.solution: Add momentum filter at entry - only enter during high turbulence
solutions_ranked.impact: Avoid exhaustion-point entries, improve entry quality

solutions_ranked.solution: Increase TARGET distance from 2x to 3-4x ATR
solutions_ranked.impact: More scouts might hit target before timeout

solutions_ranked.solution: Exit on first unprofitable bar after being profitable
solutions_ranked.impact: Dynamic exit based on scout behavior

bottom_line.priority: Fix scout entry quality or timeout handling, NOT FoR
